note: These are REMAINING targets for the 17 new primary selections N2-C must make — N2-A (miner-canary-dotnet-001) already occupies one repository-miner / ci-build / dotnet slot and is not re-selected or re-scored here. Full 18-case totals equal these targets plus N2-A's one contribution to each dimension it touches.
combined_dimension_rationale: Frozen N2-B quota_planner.plan_selection is a greedy, single-pass, no-backtracking algorithm (empirically verified: running it with origin_kind + primary_family + ecosystem as three separate dimensions correctly fills every target but needs 22-26 candidates to do it, since any candidate that satisfies only ONE currently-open dimension still gets consumed). Collapsing origin_kind and primary_family into one combined 'origin_family_group' dimension, whose target values sum to exactly 17, makes the SAME frozen algorithm produce exactly 17 by construction (each candidate has exactly one combined value, so a target can never be filled past its exact count). Ecosystem minimums are then verified as a post-hoc check on the resulting 17 (selection.py's ECOSYSTEM_MINIMUMS check) rather than a second live greedy dimension — real-candidate ecosystem diversity was curated during discovery specifically so the two checks agree without any manual reordering.
